title: GD Stage Dispatch Ledger
description: Records one stage's dispatch result: which child agents ran, what they produced, and the main agent's merge decision.

stage.description: The GD pipeline stage this ledger records.

parent_run_id.description: Non-empty identifier for the parent orchestration run.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this ledger was written.

max_parallel.description: Maximum number of child agents allowed to run in parallel (1–2).

child_jobs.description: One entry per dispatched child agent.

job_id.description: Unique identifier for this child job.

result_path.description: Path to the child agent's output artifact.

result_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the child output artifact (64 lowercase hex chars).

status.description: Terminal status of this child job.

main_agent_merge.description: Main agent's synthesis of child outputs into a single decision.

merge_report_path.description: Path to the merged review/execution report produced by the main agent.

merge_report_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the merge report (64 lowercase hex chars).

final_decision.description: Merged verdict from the main agent.

blocking_buckets.description: List of review bucket names that caused a non-APPROVED decision (empty when APPROVED).
